languages.text: Лорд-капитан обнаружил{mf||а} древние засечки, оставленные {mf|его|ее} легендарным предком.
The Lord Captain has discovered ancient marks left by {mf|his|her} legendary ancestor.
languages.original_text: Лорд-капитан обнаружил{mf||а} древние засечки, оставленные {mf|его|ее} легендарным предком.

traits.locale_text: The Lord Captain has discovered ancient notches left by {mf|his|her} legendary ancestor.

The Lord Captain has discovered ancient marks left by {mf|his|her} legendary ancestor.

languages.text: Der Lord Captain hat uralte Spuren seines legendären Ahnherren entdeckt.
languages.original_text: The Lord Captain has discovered ancient marks left by {mf|his|her} legendary ancestor.

traits.locale_text: Der Lord Captain hat uralte Spuren seines legendären Ahnherren entdeckt.

languages.text: {mf|Le seigneur-capitaine|la seigneure-capitaine} a découvert d'anciennes marques laissées par son ancêtre légendaire.
languages.original_text: The Lord Captain has discovered ancient marks left by {mf|his|her} legendary ancestor.

traits.locale_text: {mf|Le seigneur-capitaine|la seigneure-capitaine} a découvert d'anciennes marques laissées par son ancêtre légendaire.

languages.text: 舰长大人发现了那位传奇先祖留下的古老标记。
languages.original_text: The Lord Captain has discovered ancient marks left by {mf|his|her} legendary ancestor.

traits.locale_text: 舰长大人发现了那位传奇先祖留下的古老标记。

languages.text: {mf|El|La} Lord Capitán ha descubierto marcas dejadas por su legendario antepasado.
languages.original_text: The Lord Captain has discovered ancient marks left by {mf|his|her} legendary ancestor.

traits.locale_text: {mf|El|La} Lord Capitán ha descubierto marcas dejadas por su legendario antepasado.

languages.text: キャプテン卿は、伝説の先祖が残した古代のセリフを発見した。
languages.original_text: The Lord Captain discovered ancient serifs left by his legendary ancestor.

languages.text: Lord Kaptan, efsanevi atasının bıraktığı kadim işaretleri keşfetti.
languages.original_text: The Lord Captain has discovered ancient marks left by {mf|his|her} legendary ancestor.
